infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Half-Life reads heart-rate and sleep data only after you choose to connect Apple Health, to personalize caffeine-clearance estimates. Your Apple Health data is not uploaded by this app.

plugins.cameraPermission: Half-Life uses the camera only when you choose to photograph a drink for your private intake record.
plugins.photosPermission: Half-Life lets you choose a drink photo from your library for your private intake record.

plugins.healthSharePermission: Half-Life reads heart-rate and sleep data only after you choose to connect Apple Health, to personalize caffeine-clearance estimates. Your Apple Health data is not uploaded by this app.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: Half-Life does not write health data to Apple Health.
